Notice Of Hearing And Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Apr-15-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dara Tang of Hayes Scott Bonino Ellingson & McLay LLP telephone number 650-637-9100 for Petitioner TLC of The Bay Area.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PETITIONER TLC OF THE BAY AREA'S Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. Order and a separate judgment signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/HK)
